items.name: Aglio e Olio
items.description: Spaghetti tossed in olive oil, garlic, and chili flakes, topped with fresh parsley.

items.name: Seafood Marinara
items.description: Spaghetti with mussels, shrimp, and squid in a rich tomato marinara sauce.

items.name: Carbonara
items.description: Creamy egg-based sauce with crispy bacon bits and cracked black pepper.

items.name: Hawaiian
items.description: Classic tomato sauce, mozzarella, ham, and sweet pineapple.

items.name: Beef Shawarma
items.description: Spiced beef strips, garlic sauce, fresh tomatoes and onions on a golden flatbread crust.

items.name: Lola Lys Signature
items.description: Our signature pizza loaded with salami, ground beef, mozzarella, olives, green peppers, and plenty of cheesy goodness.

items.name: Chicken Tenders
items.description: Golden crispy chicken tenders, lightly breaded and served with dipping sauce.

items.name: Fries
items.description: Classic golden french fries, crispy and lightly salted.

items.name: Flavored Fries
items.description: Crispy fries seasoned with your choice of flavoring.

items.name: Americano
items.description: Rich black espresso shots topped with hot water for a smooth, bold cup.

items.name: Vanilla Latte
items.description: Espresso with steamed milk and a hint of sweet vanilla.

items.name: Caramel Macchiato
items.description: Layered espresso and steamed milk topped with a golden caramel drizzle.

items.name: White Mocha
items.description: Espresso blended with creamy white chocolate and steamed milk.

items.name: Cappuccino
items.description: Espresso topped with thick velvety milk foam and a light dusting of cocoa.
